checkAndRecord(address,uint256).notice: Performs all policy checks and records execution data for rate limits & daily spend.

checkAndRecordString(string,address,uint.notice: Checks policies for string-based merchant identifiers, records execution data.

getAddressReputation(address).notice: Resolves the reputation of an address. Uses custom registered score, otherwise falls back to a deterministic address hash.

getNameReputation(string).notice: Resolves the reputation of a merchant string name. Uses custom name registry, checks for suspicious keywords, or falls back to deterministic string hash.
